_comment: Quarter-turn demo: zoom on the lone Spearmen (seed 12345, ~500,300, facing south), select it, then press E. Every soldier pivots 90° to the right in place — nobody marches — and the block's frontage and depth swap (a wide, shallow line becomes a narrow, deep column facing east). Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
